title: Serendustry
body:
Just your average GregTech addon.

BE WARNED: This mod is unstable, features could be added, removed or changed at any time

- Adds UHV+ content
- Adds a new multiblock, Industrial Laboratory, which can simulate processes by placing machines physically inside of it (fairly wip)
- Adds some random secret features for your enjoyment (or detriment)

Thats really all it adds, I hope this description is long enough for the project to be approved
